title: Build comprehensive insurance management application for KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS

requirements.text: Create a customer management system with the ability to add new customers including fields for name, phone number, and address

quotes: Add new customers with details: name, phone number, address

acceptanceCriteria: Form accepts customer name, phone number, and address fields
Customer data is persisted in backend storage
Validation ensures required fields are filled before submission

requirements.text: Implement customer list view with search and filter capabilities

quotes: View and manage customer list
Search/filter customers

acceptanceCriteria: All customers are displayed in a data table
Search functionality filters customers by name, phone, or address
Filter results update in real-time as user types

requirements.text: Create policy management system with fields for policy number, policy type, insurance company name, customer assignment, start date, and expiry date

quotes: Add new policies with: policy number, policy type, insurance company name, customer assignment, start date, expiry date

acceptanceCriteria: Form captures all required policy fields
Policy can be linked to an existing customer
Start date and expiry date are validated for logical ordering
Policy data is persisted in backend storage

requirements.text: Implement policy document upload functionality with file storage

quotes: Upload policy documents (file upload)

acceptanceCriteria: File upload interface accepts PDF and common document formats
Documents are stored and associated with specific policies
Uploaded documents can be retrieved and viewed

requirements.text: Add road tax expiry date tracking to policy records

quotes: Track road tax expiry dates

acceptanceCriteria: Policy form includes optional road tax expiry date field
Road tax expiry date is stored with policy data
Road tax expiry information is displayed in policy details

requirements.text: Create alerts and notifications system that highlights policies expiring soon, insurance renewal reminders, and road tax expiry alerts

quotes: Policy expiration alerts (highlight policies expiring soon)
Insurance renewal reminders
Road tax expiry alerts

acceptanceCriteria: System identifies policies expiring within 30 days
Visual indicators highlight expiring policies in lists and tables
Separate alerts view shows all upcoming expirations and renewals
Road tax expiry dates trigger alerts when approaching

requirements.text: Build dashboard showing upcoming renewals and expirations with summary metrics

quotes: Dashboard showing upcoming renewals and expirations

acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard displays count of policies expiring in next 7, 30, and 90 days
List of upcoming renewals sorted by expiry date
Quick access links to customers and policies needing attention
Visual indicators for urgent vs upcoming expirations

requirements.text: Implement navigation menu with sections for Dashboard, Customers, Policies, Alerts, Help, Support, and Legal

quotes: Main menu with sections: Dashboard, Customers, Policies, Alerts, Help, Support, Legal

acceptanceCriteria: Navigation menu is accessible from all pages
All specified sections are present and functional
Active section is visually indicated
Menu is responsive and works on mobile devices

requirements.text: Add quick access 'Add Policy' option in navigation and filter policies by insurance company

quotes: Add Policy option
Filter policies by company

acceptanceCriteria: Add Policy button or link is prominently accessible in navigation
Policy list includes filter dropdown for insurance company
Filter updates policy list to show only selected company's policies

requirements.text: Implement PDF generation for customer data reports and policy details reports with export functionality

quotes: Generate PDF reports for customer data
Generate PDF reports for policy details
Export customer and policy information

acceptanceCriteria: Customer details can be exported to PDF format
Policy details can be exported to PDF format
PDF reports include company branding
Export buttons are accessible from customer and policy detail views

requirements.text: Apply company branding throughout the application with company name 'KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS', tagline 'IRDAI Registered Insurance Partner | Insurance | CA | Legal', and contact information '6290932283, krishnatechandsolutions@gmail.com'

quotes: Company name: KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS
Tagline: IRDAI Registered Insurance Partner | Insurance | CA | Legal
Contact: 6290932283, krishnatechandsolutions@gmail.com

acceptanceCriteria: Company name appears in header or navigation bar
Tagline is displayed prominently on main pages
Contact information is accessible from Support or Help sections
Branding is consistent across all pages

requirements.text: Design a professional, insurance-business-appropriate interface with clear navigation, data tables for listings, and visual alert indicators for expiring policies

quotes: Use a professional design suitable for an insurance business with clear navigation, data tables, and alert indicators

acceptanceCriteria: Color scheme and typography convey professionalism and trustworthiness suitable for financial services
Data tables are clean, readable, and include sorting capabilities
Alert indicators use color coding (red for urgent, yellow for upcoming)
Layout is organized with clear visual hierarchy and whitespace

constraints: File uploads must be handled through the backend for proper storage
PDF generation must work on both customer and policy data
All dates must be validated to prevent invalid date ranges
Search and filter operations must be performant with large datasets
nonGoals: Email or SMS notification delivery to customers
Integration with external insurance company APIs
Multi-user authentication with role-based access control

required: Professional insurance business logo for KRISHNA TECH AND SOLUTIONS with shield or protection symbolism in blue and gold tones (logo.dim_200x200.png)
